elements.text: You've been feeling run down lately and cancel on plans that you made with your friends. Your friends express frustration, saying that they planned this a long time ago and were looking forward to seeing you. You think that you made the best decision for...

elements.name: canceling_on_friends_--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
